Looking at the header code in `AgentDetail.tsx`, I can see the spacing differences:

**Left side (back button + agent name):**
- Back button: `w-8 h-8` (32px × 32px) with centered SVG icon
- The icon is centered within this 32px container, so the arrow sits at ~16px from the button's left edge
- No extra left margin on the button itself

**Right side (Publish button):**
- Publish text: `px-4` (16px padding on each side)
- Dropdown arrow section: `px-3` (12px padding on each side)
- The arrow icon has 12px of space from the button's right edge

**The misalignment:**
The back arrow appears to have more "breathing room" from the edge because it's centered in a 32px wide button (effectively ~16px from button edge to arrow center), while the dropdown arrow only has 12px padding (px-3) from the button edge.

To make them visually aligned, the Publish button's dropdown section should have `px-4` instead of `px-3` to match the back button's visual spacing:

+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ import { Agents } from "@/components/Agents";
+ 
+ export default function AgentsPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="agents"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;Agents
+         onNavigateToAgent={(agentUuid) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;)}
+       /&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+

+ 
+ export default function AgentDetailPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const params = useParams();
+   const uuid = params.uuid as string;
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [customHeader, setCustomHeader] = useState&lt;React.ReactNode&gt;(null);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="agents"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+       customHeader={customHeader}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;AgentDetail agentUuid={uuid} onHeaderUpdate={setCustomHeader} /&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

Done! Replaced all hardcoded pixel values with standard Tailwind classes:

**AppLayout.tsx:**
- `text-[14px]` → `text-sm`
- `text-[15px]` → `text-base`
- `text-[11px]` → `text-xs`

**AgentDetail.tsx:**
- `text-[14px]` → `text-sm`
- `text-[13px]` → `text-sm`
- `text-[16px]` → `text-base`

Tailwind's text scale:
- `text-xs` = 12px
- `text-sm` = 14px
- `text-base` = 16px
- `text-lg` = 18px

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_cmd** • Run command: python3 -c "
import requests
import json

url = 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models'
headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer 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'}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
models = response.json()

extracted_models = []
for m in models['data']:
    if ':' in m['name']:
        category, name = m['name'].split(':', 1)
        category = category.strip()
        name = name.strip()
    else:
        category = ''
        name = m['name']
    extracted_models.append({
        'id': m['id'],
        'name': name,
        'category': category
    })

# Group by category
categories = {}
for m in extracted_models:
    cat = m['category'] if m['category'] else 'Others'
    if cat not in categories:
        categories[cat] = []
    categories[cat].append({'id': m['id'], 'name': m['name']})

# Print as JSON
print(json.dumps(categories, indent=2))
"
</summary>

-       { id: "claude-3.5-sonnet", name: "Claude 3.5 Sonnet" },
-       { id: "claude-3-haiku", name: "Claude 3 Haiku" },

-   },
-   {
-     name: "Others",
-     models: [

-       { id: "qwen3-30b-a3b", name: "Qwen3-30B-A3B" },
-     ],
-   },
- ];
- 
- export function AgentDetail({ agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate }: AgentDetailProps) {
-   const [agent, setAgent] = useState&lt;AgentData | null&gt;(null);
-   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
-   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
-   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;
-     "agent" | "tools" | "evaluation" | "settings"
-   &gt;("agent");
-   const [systemPrompt, setSystemPrompt] = useState("");
-   const [sttProvider, setSttProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("");
-   const [ttsProvider, setTtsProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("");
-   const [selectedLLM, setSelectedLLM] = useState&lt;LLMModel | null&gt;({
-     id: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
-     name: "Gemini 3 Flash Preview",
-   });
-   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [llmSearchQuery, setLlmSearchQuery] = useState("");
-   const [endConversationEnabled, setEndConversationEnabled] = useState(true);
-   const [toolsSearchQuery, setToolsSearchQuery] = useState("");
- 
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     const fetchAgent = async () =&gt; {
-       try {
-         setIsLoading(true);
-         setError(null);
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;, {
-           method: "GET",
-           headers: {
-             accept: "application/json",
-             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-           },
-         });
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to fetch agent");
-         }
- 
-         const data: AgentData = await response.json();
-         setAgent(data);
- 
-         // Initialize form fields from agent config if available
-         if (data.config) {
-           if (data.config.system_prompt) {
-             setSystemPrompt(data.config.system_prompt);
-           }
-           if (data.config.stt_provider) {
-             setSttProvider(data.config.stt_provider);
-           }
-           if (data.config.tts_provider) {
-             setTtsProvider(data.config.tts_provider);
-           }
-         }
- 
-         // Update header when agent is loaded
-         if (onHeaderUpdate) {
-           onHeaderUpdate(
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full"&gt;
-               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-                 &lt;Link
-                   href="/agents"
-                   className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
-                   title="Back to agents"
-                 &gt;
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-5 h-5"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     stroke="currentColor"
-                     strokeWidth={2}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       strokeLinecap="round"
-                       strokeLinejoin="round"
-                       d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 &lt;/Link&gt;
-                 &lt;h1 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;{data.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-               &lt;button className="flex items-center h-9 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"&gt;
-                 &lt;span className="px-4"&gt;Publish&lt;/span&gt;
-                 &lt;div className="w-px h-5 bg-gray-300 my-auto"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
-                 &lt;div className="px-4 flex items-center"&gt;
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-4 h-4"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     stroke="currentColor"
-                     strokeWidth={2}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       strokeLinecap="round"
-                       strokeLinejoin="round"
-                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           );
-         }
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error fetching agent:", err);
-         setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load agent");
-       } finally {
-         setIsLoading(false);
-       }
-     };
- 
-     if (agentUuid) {
-       fetchAgent();
-     }
- 
-     // Cleanup: clear header when component unmounts
-     return () =&gt; {
-       if (onHeaderUpdate) {
-         onHeaderUpdate(null);
-       }
-     };
-   }, [agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate]);
- 
-   if (isLoading) {
-     return (
-       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;

-         &gt;

-           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${

-               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"

-         &gt;

-           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("settings")}
-           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${

-               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
-           }&#96;}
-         &gt;
-           Settings
-         &lt;/button&gt;
-       &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-       {/* Agent Tab Content */}
-       {activeTab === "agent" &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;

-                 System prompt

-                   No tools found
-                 &lt;/h3&gt;
-                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4"&gt;

-                 &lt;/p&gt;
-                 &lt;button className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
-                   Add tool

-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-             {/* Right Column - In-built Tools */}
-             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
-               &lt;div&gt;
-                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                   In-built tools
-                 &lt;/h3&gt;
-                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
-                   Allow the agent perform built-in actions.
-                 &lt;/p&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-               &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
-                 {/* Active tools counter */}
-                 &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 bg-muted/30 border-b border-border"&gt;
-                   &lt;span className="text-base text-foreground"&gt;
-                     {endConversationEnabled ? "1" : "0"} active tools
-                   &lt;/span&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-                 {/* End conversation tool */}
-                 &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
-                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-                     &lt;svg
-                       className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
-                       fill="none"
-                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                       stroke="currentColor"
-                       strokeWidth={1.5}
-                     &gt;
-                       &lt;path
-                         strokeLinecap="round"
-                         strokeLinejoin="round"
-                         d="M11.42 15.17L17.25 21A2.652 2.652 0 0021 17.25l-5.877-5.877M11.42 15.17l2.496-3.03c.317-.384.74-.626 1.208-.766M11.42 15.17l-4.655 5.653a2.548 2.548 0 11-3.586-3.586l6.837-5.63m5.108-.233c.55-.164 1.163-.188 1.743-.14a4.5 4.5 0 004.486-6.336l-3.276 3.277a3.004 3.004 0 01-2.25-2.25l3.276-3.276a4.5 4.5 0 00-6.336 4.486c.091 1.076-.071 2.264-.904 2.95l-.102.085m-1.745 1.437L5.909 7.5H4.5L2.25 3.75l1.5-1.5L7.5 4.5v1.409l4.26 4.26m-1.745 1.437l1.745-1.437m6.615 8.206L15.75 15.75M4.867 19.125h.008v.008h-.008v-.008z"
-                       /&gt;
-                     &lt;/svg&gt;
-                     &lt;span className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                       End conversation
-                     &lt;/span&gt;
-                   &lt;/div&gt;
-                   {/* Toggle Switch */}
-                   &lt;button
-                     onClick={() =&gt;
-                       setEndConversationEnabled(!endConversationEnabled)
-                     }
-                     className={&#96;relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
-                       endConversationEnabled ? "bg-foreground" : "bg-muted"
-                     }&#96;}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;div
-                       className={&#96;absolute top-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-background transition-transform ${
-                         endConversationEnabled
-                           ? "translate-x-5"
-                           : "translate-x-0.5"
-                       }&#96;}
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/button&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
- 
-       {/* Evaluation Tab Content */}
-       {activeTab === "evaluation" &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
-           &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-             Evaluation configuration coming soon.
-           &lt;/p&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
- 
-       {/* Settings Tab Content */}
-       {activeTab === "settings" &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
-           &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-             Settings configuration coming soon.
-           &lt;/p&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
-     &lt;/div&gt;
-   );

+ 
+ export function AgentDetail({ agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate }: AgentDetailProps) {
+   const [agent, setAgent] = useState&lt;AgentData | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;
+     "agent" | "tools" | "evaluation" | "settings"
+   &gt;("agent");
+   const [systemPrompt, setSystemPrompt] = useState("");
+   const [sttProvider, setSttProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("");
+   const [ttsProvider, setTtsProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("");
+   const [selectedLLM, setSelectedLLM] = useState&lt;LLMModel | null&gt;({
+     id: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
+     name: "Gemini 3 Flash Preview",
+   });
+   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [llmSearchQuery, setLlmSearchQuery] = useState("");
+   const [endConversationEnabled, setEndConversationEnabled] = useState(true);
+   const [toolsSearchQuery, setToolsSearchQuery] = useState("");
+ 
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchAgent = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch agent");
+         }
+ 
+         const data: AgentData = await response.json();
+         setAgent(data);
+ 
+         // Initialize form fields from agent config if available
+         if (data.config) {
+           if (data.config.system_prompt) {
+             setSystemPrompt(data.config.system_prompt);
+           }
+           if (data.config.stt_provider) {
+             setSttProvider(data.config.stt_provider);
+           }
+           if (data.config.tts_provider) {
+             setTtsProvider(data.config.tts_provider);
+           }
+         }
+ 
+         // Update header when agent is loaded
+         if (onHeaderUpdate) {
+           onHeaderUpdate(
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;Link
+                   href="/agents"
+                   className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                   title="Back to agents"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-5 h-5"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/Link&gt;
+                 &lt;h1 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;{data.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button className="flex items-center h-9 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"&gt;
+                 &lt;span className="px-4"&gt;Publish&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="w-px h-5 bg-gray-300 my-auto"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="px-4 flex items-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           );
+         }
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching agent:", err);
+         setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load agent");
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     if (agentUuid) {
+       fetchAgent();
+     }
+ 
+     // Cleanup: clear header when component unmounts
+     return () =&gt; {
+       if (onHeaderUpdate) {
+         onHeaderUpdate(null);
+       }
+     };
+   }, [agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate]);
+ 
+   if (isLoading) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;svg className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+             &lt;circle
+               className="opacity-25"
+               cx="12"
+               cy="12"
+               r="10"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth="4"
+             &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+             &lt;path
+               className="opacity-75"
+               fill="currentColor"
+               d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+             &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+           &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;span className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+             Loading agent...
+           &lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   if (error) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+             className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Retry
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   if (!agent) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;Agent not found&lt;/p&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       {/* Tabs Navigation */}
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 border-b border-border -mt-6"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("agent")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "agent"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Agent
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("tools")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "tools"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Tools
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("evaluation")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "evaluation"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Evaluation
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setActiveTab("settings")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "settings"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Settings
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Agent Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "agent" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;
+           {/* Left Column: System Prompt */}
+           &lt;div className="flex flex-col"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;label className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 System prompt
+               &lt;/label&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
+                 &lt;button className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008z"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;

+ "use client";
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ 
+ export default function ToolsPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="tools"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-2"&gt;Tools&lt;/h1&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-base leading-relaxed"&gt;
+             Manage and configure tools that can be used by your agents.
+           &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

+     setParameters(parameters.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== id));
+   };
+ 
+   const updateParameter = (id: string, updates: Partial&lt;Parameter&gt;) =&gt; {
+     setParameters(
+       parameters.map((p) =&gt; (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p))
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   const addEnumValue = (id: string) =&gt; {
+     const param = parameters.find((p) =&gt; p.id === id);
+     if (param &amp;&amp; param.newEnumValue.trim()) {
+       updateParameter(id, {
+         enumValues: [...param.enumValues, param.newEnumValue.trim()],
+         newEnumValue: "",
+       });
+     }
+   };
+

+     const param = parameters.find((p) =&gt; p.id === paramId);
+     if (param) {
+       updateParameter(paramId, {
+         enumValues: param.enumValues.filter((_, i) =&gt; i !== index),
+       });
+     }
+   };

Done! I've updated the Parameters section in the create tool dialog to match the design. It now includes:

1. **Header** - "Parameters" title with description "Define the parameters that will be sent with the event." and "Add param" button

2. **Parameter Cards** (when you click "Add param") with:

   - **Identifier** input field
   - **Required** checkbox
   - **Value Type** dropdown (LLM Prompt, Static, User Input)
   - **Description** textarea with helper text: "This field will be passed to the LLM and should describe in detail how to extract the data from the transcript."
   - **Enum Values (optional)** with input field and + button to add values, plus ability to remove them
   - Helper text: "Add predefined values that the LLM can select from. If no values are provided, the LLM can use any string value."
   - **Delete** button to remove the parameter
